steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most accurately states Curtis's finding. The passage says Curtis found lunar intensity was 'positively associated with foraging by mongoose lemurs' — more light, more foraging.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — explains the discrepancy between Curtis's and Brown's findings: This choice frames a comparison between researchers rather than stating Curtis's finding alone. ✗
  • Choice B — as lunar intensity increases, mongoose lemurs increase their foraging activity: This directly restates the positive association Curtis found. ✓
  • Choice C — mongoose lemurs rely less on their vision advantage as lunar intensity increases: The passage does not say reliance on vision changes with lunar intensity. ✗
  • Choice D — reports Brown's finding about mice: Brown's study is a separate finding about a different species. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
